name: customer
description: A comprehensive AI agent skill for acquiring, onboarding, retaining, and growing customers. Covers health scoring, churn prevention, renewal strategy, expansion revenue, customer advocacy, and exit analysis for B2B and SaaS businesses.
author: AGIstack

capabilities.health_scoring: Builds predictive health score frameworks calibrated to specific products and customer bases
capabilities.churn_prevention: Identifies at-risk customers early and executes intervention playbooks
capabilities.onboarding_design: Structures onboarding programs that reliably deliver first value within 90 days
capabilities.renewal_management: Builds renewal motions that make uncertain renewals rare
capabilities.expansion_identification: Surfaces expansion signals and builds conversations that feel like advocacy
capabilities.churn_analysis: Extracts patterns from churned customers to fix preventable churn systematically

heartbeat.daily: Health alerts and urgent account identification
heartbeat.weekly: Full portfolio review with renewal and onboarding status
heartbeat.monthly: Business review preparation for each scheduled QBR
heartbeat.quarterly: Portfolio health analysis including churn, expansion, and NPS trends

audience: Customer success managers with a book of 20-100 accounts
VP of Customer Success building a scalable CS function
Founders doing customer success themselves before hiring
Account managers responsible for renewal and expansion revenue
SaaS businesses experiencing churn they cannot explain
